member.name: T:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException
member.summary: The alarm exception class.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the alarm info of the exception.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.GetAlarmInfo
member.summary: Get the alarm info.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.GetAlarmMessage
member.summary: Get the constructed alarm message.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.GetConsolePrintout(System.String,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Get the exception info to the console.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo
member.summary: struct of the Alarm Information.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The module that triggers the alarm.
The slot that triggers the alarm.
The pin name that triggers the alarm.
The channel of the pin that triggers the alarm.
The value measured at the point of alarm triggerred.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets the alarm name.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Description
member.summary: Gets the alarm description.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Pin
member.summary: Gets the alarm pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Module
member.summary: Gets the alarm module.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Channel
member.summary: Gets the alarm pin channel.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.Slot
member.summary: Gets the alarm slot.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo.MeasuredValue
member.summary: Gets the measured value. 0.0D is a valid value, so we need this to be nullable.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Exceptions.BaseException
member.summary: The Base exception for all Prime exceptions.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.BaseException.File
member.summary: Gets the File name of the exception.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.BaseException.Function
member.summary: Gets the Function name of the exception.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.BaseException.Line
member.summary: Gets the line number of the exception.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.Exceptions.BaseException.StackTrace
member.summary: Gets the StackTrace information from the exception Override the Exception.StackTrace property to make stack trace shorter in console printout strip out the .NET framework from it https://stackoverflow.com/questions/13451622/filter-out-non-user-code-methods-from-stacktrace.
